name: PORTFOLIO Ontology (BCG, Three Horizons, Investment Maps, Strategic Lens)
description: Innermost execution layer: BCG Growth-Share Matrix (portfolio classification), Three Horizons Model (innovation investment), Strategic Investment Maps (budget-to-strategy alignment), Portfolio Strategic Lens (focused graph views by product/brand/BU), and Strategic Direction Summary (executive one-pager capstone). Bridges VSOM strategy to PPM portfolio execution. Part of VE-Series VSOM-SA sub-series.

components.GrowthShareMatrix: BCG matrix — portfolio analysis by relative market share x growth rate
components.HorizonInitiative: Initiative assigned to a specific horizon with risk and ROI
components.InvestmentAllocation: Single investment allocation linking theme to budget and BSC perspective
components.PortfolioStrategicLens: Focused analytical view for AI agents — zoom into a single portfolio element
components.StrategicDirectionSummary: Executive one-pager capstone: where we play, how we win, what bets we make

crossOntology.name: allocationAlignedToStrategy
crossOntology.purpose: Investment aligned to VSOM strategy pillars

crossOntology.name: allocationOwnedBy
crossOntology.purpose: Investment allocations owned by executive roles

domain: Portfolio Management, Innovation Strategy, Resource Allocation

versionHistory.changes: Initial release — BCG, Three Horizons, Investment Maps, Strategic Lens, Direction Summary

notes: Layer 5 (Portfolio/Execution) of VSOM Strategy Analysis. Capstone layer with 12 imports — touches the entire graph. PortfolioStrategicLens is the AI agent 'zoom-in'. StrategicDirectionSummary is the executive one-pager output.
